sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الْمَنْسَفُ الْأُرْدُنِيُّ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ مُجَرَّدِ وَجْبَةٍ غِذَائِيَّةٍ، فَهُوَ رَمْزٌ لِلْكَرَمِ وَالْحَفَاوَةِ الَّتِي يَمْتَازُ بِهَا أَهْلُ الْمِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Jordanski mansaf se smatra nečim više od običnog obroka; on je simbol velikodušnosti i gostoprimstva po kojem su poznati stanovnici regije.
sentences.translationEn: Jordanian Mansaf is considered more than just a meal; it is a symbol of the generosity and hospitality for which the people of the region are known.

sentences.arabic: يَتَكَوَّنُ هَذَا الطَّبَقُ الْعَرِيقُ مِنْ لَحْمِ الضَّأْنِ الْمَطْهُوِّ بِالْجَمِيدِ، وَهُوَ نَوْعٌ مِنَ اللَّبَنِ الْمُجَفَّفِ الَّذِي يُعْطِيهِ نَكْهَةً حَامِضِيَّةً مُمَيَّزَةً.
sentences.translation: Ovo drevno jelo sastoji se od jagnjetine kuhane u jamidu, što je vrsta sušenog jogurta koji mu daje karakterističan kiselkast ukus.
sentences.translationEn: This ancient dish consists of lamb cooked in jameed, which is a type of dried yogurt that gives it a distinctive sour flavor.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدَّمُ اللَّحْمُ فَوْقَ طَبَقَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ مِنَ الْأُرْزِ وَخُبْزِ الشِّرَاكِ الرَّقِيقِ، ثُمَّ يُزَيَّنُ بِاللَّوْزِ وَالصَّنَوْبَرِ الْمُحَمَّصِ لِإِضْفَاءِ لَمْسَةٍ مِنَ الْفَخَامَةِ.
sentences.translation: Meso se poslužuje na velikom sloju riže i tankog širak hljeba, a zatim se ukrašava prženim bademima i pinjolima kako bi se dodao dašak luksuza.
sentences.translationEn: The meat is served over a large layer of rice and thin shrak bread, then decorated with roasted almonds and pine nuts to add a touch of luxury.

sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُ الضُّيُوفُ حَوْلَ صِينِيَّةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ، مِمَّا يُعَزِّزُ رُوحَ الْمُشَارَكَةِ وَالْأُلْفَةِ بَيْنَ الْحَاضِرِينَ فِي الْمُنَاسَبَاتِ السَّعِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Gosti se okupljaju oko jedne velike tepsije, što jača duh dijeljenja i bliskosti među prisutnima u sretnim prilikama.
sentences.translationEn: Guests gather around a single large tray, which enhances the spirit of sharing and intimacy among those present on happy occasions.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ إِتْقَانَ طَبْخِ الْمَنْسَفِ يَتَطَلَّبُ صَبْرًا وَخِبْرَةً طَوِيلَةً لِضَمَانِ نُضْجِ اللَّحْمِ وَتَوَازُنِ النَّكْهَاتِ بِشَكْلٍ مِثَالِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Ovladavanje pripremom mansafa zahtijeva strpljenje i dugo iskustvo kako bi se osiguralo da meso bude pečeno i da okusi budu savršeno uravnoteženi.
sentences.translationEn: Mastering the cooking of Mansaf requires patience and long experience to ensure the meat is tender and the flavors are perfectly balanced.
